title: tecoma stans var. sambucifolia
intro: Tecoma stans var. sambucifolia, also known as yellow trumpetbush, is a variety of the Tecoma stans plant, a flowering shrub native to the Americas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The leaves and flowers of the Tecoma stans var. sambucifolia have been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In addition to its medicinal properties, the plant is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions, and its flowers and leaves are also used as a natural dye and to attract pollinators.
